AITrust001: 1. I am confident in the tool. I feel that it works well.
AITrust002: 2. The outputs of the tool are very predictable.
AITrust003: 3. The tool is very reliable. I can count on it to be correct all the time.
AITrust004: 4. I feel safe that when I rely on the tool I will get the right answers.
AITrust005: 5. The tool is efficient in that it works very quickly.
AITrust006: 6. I am wary of the tool
AITrust007: 7. The tool can perform the task better than a novice human user.
AITrust008: 8. I like using the tool for decision making.
AITrustOpen: Please indicate any reasons you have for trusting or not trusting this system.
debrief: Thank you for completing this questionnaire.
question_head: Consider your use of the system or tool you have been instructed to evaluate.  Please answer each of the questions regarding how much you can trust and rely on the system.
